question: (Spillage) Which of the following practices may reduce your appeal as a target for adversaries seeking to exploit your insider status?
canonical_answer: Remove your security badge after leaving your controlled area or office building.

appears_in.title: Two Factor Authentication Cyber Awareness
appears_in.answer: Remove your security badge after leaving your controlled area or office building.
